faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in South Orange, NJ?
faqs.answer: Flea treatment in South Orange typically ranges from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and number of treatments required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you provide flea treatment in South Orange?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day flea treatment services in South Orange for urgent situations. Our team understands that flea infestations require immediate attention, especially in homes with children and pets, and we prioritize fast response times throughout Essex County.

faqs.question: Is flea treatment safe for my pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and pet-safe treatment methods that are highly effective against fleas while being safe for your family and pets. We provide clear instructions on any necessary precautions and recommended re-entry times, typically allowing you to return home within a few hours of treatment.

faqs.question: Will one flea treatment be enough to eliminate the infestation?
faqs.answer: Most flea infestations in South Orange require 2-3 treatments spaced 2-3 weeks apart to eliminate all life stages, including eggs, larvae, pupae, and adults. We include follow-up visits in our service to ensure complete eradication and provide a warranty on our work for your peace of mind.
